allow: Bash(python -c "import sounddevice; import sherpa_onnx; print\('sounddevice:', sounddevice.__version__\); print\('sherpa-onnx:', sherpa_onnx.__version__\)")
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match "node|tauri|cargo|rust|powershell|cmd|conhost" } | Select-Object ProcessName, Id, StartTime, MainWindowTitle | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(try { $r1 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:18642/health" -TimeoutSec 3 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Agent \(18642\): OK - $\($r1.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Agent \(18642\): DOWN - $_" }; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/health" -TimeoutSec 3 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Heimdall \(8765\): OK - $\($r2.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Heimdall \(8765\): DOWN - $_" })

PowerShell($body = '{"model":"deepseek-v4-pro","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"say hi in one word"}],"stream":true}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:18642/v1/chat/completions" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "BODY \(first 2000 chars\):"; $r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(2000, $r.Content.Length\)\) } catch { $err = $_.Exception; if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $respBody = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); Write-Host "ERROR BODY: $respBody" } else { Write-Host "ERROR: $_" } })

PowerShell($body = '{"model":"deepseek-v4-flash","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"say hi in one word"}],"stream":true}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:18642/v1/chat/completions" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 15 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host $r.Content } catch { $err = $_.Exception; if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $respBody = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); Write-Host "ERROR: $respBody" } else { Write-Host "ERROR: $_" } })

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:18642/v1/chat/completions -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"hermes-agent","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"say hello in one word"}],"stream":false}' --max-time 30)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:18642/v1/chat/completions -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"hermes-agent","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"say hello in one word"}],"stream":true}' --max-time 30)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:18642/v1/chat/completions -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"hermes-agent","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"你好，用一句话介绍自己"}],"stream":false}' --max-time 30)

Bash(curl -s -w "\\nHTTP_CODE:%{http_code}" -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18789/v1/chat/completions" -H "Authorization: Bearer e6989811d53d9bb36404ffec9659192cae56911fcf3c66f1" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"model":"openclaw","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Count from 1 to 5, one per line."}],"stream":false}')

PowerShell($proc = Get-Process -Id 161612 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($proc\) { Write-Output "进程: $\($proc.ProcessName\) PID: $\($proc.Id\) 路径: $\($proc.Path\) 启动: $\($proc.StartTime\)" } else { Write-Output "PID 161612 已不存在" })

PowerShell($env:HERMES_HOME = "C:\\Users\\58451\\.ai-hel2"; $env:API_SERVER_ENABLED = "true"; $env:API_SERVER_HOST = "127.0.0.1"; $env:HERMES_INFERENCE_PROVIDER = "deepseek"; Start-Process -FilePath "hermes" -ArgumentList "gateway", "run", "--replace" -WindowStyle Hidden; Write-Output "Gateway started"; Start-Sleep 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:18642/health" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Health: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Output "NOT READY: $_" })

PowerShell($logFile = "C:\\Users\\58451\\.ai-hel2\\gateway-stderr.log"; if \(Test-Path $logFile\) { Write-Output "=== stderr log ==="; Get-Content $logFile -Tail 20 } else { Write-Output "No stderr log" }; Write-Output "`n=== AI-Hel2 processes ==="; Get-Process -Name "ai-hel2" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, StartTime, @{N="Path";E={$_.Path}})
